title: Aasroy
subTitle: Ankhu, after losing his wife, decides to marry another girl for the sake of his son, Sudhanshu. But things take a turn when Sudhanshu falls in love with Joysree, who is an orphan.

title: Bohurupi
subTitle: A traveling performer makes money by pretending to be demons for fun. However, after a wonderful dream, his mind completely changes.

title: Bandhu Tomar
subTitle: When Nilav's love is not met with reciprocation, he tries to commit suicide. However, he falls for his rescuer, Urmi, unaware of the dark and exploitative nature of her profession.

title: Patanjali Yog - By Yogrishi Swami Ramdev
subTitle: Baba Ramdev emphasises the importance of yoga and demonstrates various asanas and breathing exercises that enable one to lead a healthy and stress-free life.

title: Esho Maa Lakshmi
subTitle: A tale of Goddess Lakshmi that describes her divine origin, celestial beauty, and role as the bestower of wealth and prosperity in Hindu mythology.

title: Swapno
subTitle: A woman leaves a kind-hearted man owing to a misunderstanding and marries his younger brother. However, it turns out that he is the complete opposite of his elder brother.

title: Sangharsha
subTitle: In a village divided by corruption and power struggles between a politician and a doctor, honest newcomer Shubhankar challenges the status quo.

title: Putuler Protisodh
subTitle: Bini, a married woman, is murdered by her in-laws, following which her spirit possesses a doll. As she decides to seek revenge, her husband's second wife must free her spirit.

title: Mejo Bou
subTitle: Barun's father forces him to marry Sampa, a colleague from a middle-class background. After the marriage, Barun creates problems for his new wife and damages her reputation.

title: Sukh Dukher Sansar
subTitle: Amar, the eldest of four, struggles to provide a better life to his younger siblings. However, things take a turn for the worse when his younger sister meets with an accident and is visually impaired.

title: Pabitra Papi
subTitle: To teach Bhola a lesson, Rajib marries his sister, deceives them out of their land, and has Bhola imprisoned. However, Bhola vows to seek justice and avenge the wrongs done to his family.

subTitle: When Goopy and Bagha learn about Hirak Raja's tyranny, they try to set him right with the help of Udayan, a schoolteacher, and their magical powers.

title: Mayer Ashirbad
subTitle: After his mother's death, Modhu moves to the capital city where he becomes unpaid house help for his uncle. However, his fortune suddenly changes when he wins the lottery.

title: Sundar Bou
subTitle: Sabitri, who is married to Nanda, is exploited daily by her mother-in-law. Seeing this, her uncle decides to help her overcome her problems.

title: Bourani
subTitle: A manipulative woman schemes to control her brother's wealth by orchestrating a marriage, but her plans begin to unravel when unexpected love enters the picture.

title: Rakto Nodir Dhara
subTitle: Jaga, an international terrorist, avoids a prison term of 21 years by killing multiple people involved in the case. However, the sons of his victims return to seek vengeance.

title: Kalankini Badhu
subTitle: Soumik leaves his family when his brothers are contemptuous about his inability to find a job. However, his continued absence begins to tear the family apart.

title: Loafer
subTitle: Bikram is a selfless man who is unfairly hated by his family. However, after an arrest for helping a friend marry, he struggles to gain the respect of those he constantly protects.

title: Loafer

title: Mr. Perfect
subTitle: Vicky breaks his engagement with Priya, his childhood friend, after he learns that she is making many compromises for his sake. However, time makes him realise the need for compromises in life.

title: Bengal Tiger
subTitle: Circumstances turn dire for Vishal, an insouciant cop, when he is appointed as the inspector to an area reigned over by a terrifying criminal, Rukavat Singh, and his two cruel subordinates.

title: Noyonmoni
subTitle: Nayan's house catches fire after he is born, which makes people believe that he is a bad omen. His life changes drastically when his father is arrested.

title: Abhagini
subTitle: Abhagini is tortured by her stepmother all her life, but she decides to make a new start after leaving the city. Initially, the new family she is living with dislikes her, but she soon wins them over.

title: Sindoor Niye Khela
subTitle: Varsha is a powerful businesswoman, but faces opposition from her workers. In order to solve the problem, she marries the leader of the worker's union.

title: Mangaldeep
subTitle: Two best friends, Mangal and Deep, embark on a journey to the big city to fulfil their musical dreams. In his quest to see Deep succeed, Mangal risks everything, including his own finances.

title: Putrabadhu
subTitle: The members of a joint family go through various ups and downs in their lives and attempt to stay together despite all the odds stacked against them.

title: Shapath Nilam
subTitle: Sukanta is shattered when his wife, Minu, is raped on their honeymoon. Though his wife fails to recognise him after the incident, her twin sister, Debu, tries to find the culprit.

title: Sanjhbati
subTitle: An elderly woman struggles with her difficult nature and isolated life. When a new caretaker arrives, their relationship faces challenges, developing into a story about connection and companionship.
